description: Queries M-26-14 alert-coverage posture (Collection Operations) from m_26_14-metrics-alert-coverage using ES|QL. Returns, per Appendix B logging category, whether detections are active/covered plus recent rule and alert counts. Use for POA&M drafting to surface categories with no or partial detection coverage. For classification gaps use m_26_14-classification-audit-query; for retirement gaps use m_26_14-retirement-audit-query.

configuration.query: FROM m_26_14-metrics-alert-coverage | WHERE @timestamp >= ?from_date | STATS rules_active = MAX(m_26_14.rules_active), alerts_30d = MAX(m_26_14.alerts_30d), latest = MAX(@timestamp) BY category = m_26_14.category_label.keyword, coverage_status = m_26_14.coverage_status.keyword | SORT category ASC | LIMIT ?limit

from_date.description: Earliest @timestamp to include, as an ISO-8601 datetime (e.g. 2025-07-01T00:00:00.000Z). Compute this from your lookback window before calling — the metrics indices are daily snapshots, so a 90-day or 365-day floor is typical.

limit.description: Maximum number of category rows to return. Default: 50 (covers all categories).
